entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop (Pennisetum glaucum) used in the diallel cross study

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The tendency of a crossbred individual to show qualities superior to those of both parents

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of an individual to transmit favorable traits to its offspring

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD PER SEASON
entities.description: Agronomic trait measuring the amount of grain produced per season

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD PER DAY
entities.description: Agronomic trait measuring the amount of grain produced per day

entities.name: TIME TO FLOWERING
entities.description: Agronomic trait measuring the duration until the plant flowers

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: Agronomic trait measuring the vertical height of the plant

entities.name: PANICLE LENGTH
entities.description: Agronomic trait measuring the length of the panicle

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: Agronomic trait measuring the total mass of living biological organisms

entities.name: GROWTH INDEX
entities.description: Agronomic trait measuring the rate of growth

entities.name: TILLER NUMBER
entities.description: Agronomic trait measuring the number of tillers produced

entities.name: THOUSAND SEED MASS
entities.description: Agronomic trait measuring the mass of one thousand seeds

entities.name: DIALLEL CROSS
entities.description: A mating design used to evaluate combining ability and heterosis

entities.description: Geographic background of some pearl millet populations
